scan_rules.rule_1_completion_claim_validation: Scan final reports for completion claims, validate against foundation gate dependencies, detect premature claims
scan_rules.rule_2_runtime_claim_validation: Scan final reports for runtime claims, validate against evidence status files, detect false runtime claims
scan_rules.rule_3_source_implementation_validation: Scan final reports for implementation claims, validate against source code stub vs real, detect implementation contradictions
scan_rules.rule_4_checklist_consistency_validation: Scan final reports for task completion claims, validate against checklist status, detect checklist inconsistencies

violation_severity_levels.high: Premature P2 FOUNDATION COMPLETE claim, premature ALL PROVIDERS RUNTIME VERIFIED claim, false RUNTIME_PASS claim when evidence is CONTRACT_PASS/BLOCKED_ENV/FAIL
violation_severity_levels.medium: Implementation claim contradicts source stub, runtime claim contradicts source implementation, foundation claim contradicts foundation gate dependencies
violation_severity_levels.low: Checklist inconsistency, evidence reference mismatch, task status inconsistency, minor claim wording inconsistency

gate_integration: PFFG-001: Foundation Final Gate Reader runs report/source conflict scan
PFFG-002: Foundation Final Report must pass conflict scan before generation
APRV-001: All Providers Runtime Verified Gate runs report/source conflict scan

implementation_requirements.claim_extraction: Extract completion claims using regex patterns, extract runtime claims using regex patterns, extract implementation claims using regex patterns
implementation_requirements.fact_collection: Collect evidence status facts from evidence files, collect source implementation facts from source code, collect checklist status facts from checklist file
implementation_requirements.validation: Validate claims against collected facts, detect contradictions between claims and facts, classify violation severity, generate detailed violation reports
